task_goal: In Simple Calendar Pro, create a calendar event on 2023-10-15 at 15h with the title 'Appointment for Annual Report' and the description 'We will discuss annual budget.'. The event should last for 15 mins.
task_goal_rewrite: A calendar event titled 'Appointment for Annual Report' with the description 'We will discuss annual budget.' is created in Simple Calendar Pro, scheduled for 2023-10-15 from 15:00 to 15:15 (15-minute duration).

checkpoints.description: The calendar event has the exact title 'Appointment for Annual Report'.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of the event detail screen displaying the title, or the calendar view showing the event listed with this title.

checkpoints.description: The event is scheduled on 2023-10-15, starting at 15:00 and ending at 15:15 (15-minute duration).
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of the event's date and time settings showing the specified start date, start time, and end time, or the calendar view displaying the event in the correct 15-minute time slot on 2023-10-15.

checkpoints.description: The event includes the exact description 'We will discuss annual budget.'
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of the event detail screen showing the full description text.

success_rule: Success is achieved if all required checkpoints are satisfied: the event exists with the specified title, scheduled date/time (15-minute duration), and description as outlined in the task goal.
